subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! That which was written by thy musk-laden pen brought great joy to our hearts
subcodes.first_line_orig: از آيهء ‌مبارکهء قرآن ‌آتيناک سبعاً من المثانی سؤال نموده ‌بودی ، سبعاً من المثانی را علمای رسوم حواميم سبع
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
